title: QEMU calc_image_hostmem Integer Overflow Local Privilege Escalation Vulnerability
description:
This vulnerability allows local attackers to escalate privileges on affected installations of QEMU. An attacker must first obtain the ability to execute low-privileged code on the target guest system in order to exploit this vulnerability.
The specific flaw exists within the virtio-gpu driver. The issue results from the lack of proper validation of user-supplied data, which can result in an integer overflow before allocating a buffer. An attacker can leverage this vulnerability to escalate privileges and execute arbitrary code in the context of the host system.
addtionnal_details: QEMU has issued an update to correct this vulnerability. More details can be found at:https://patchew.org/QEMU/20260311-cve-v1-0-f72b4c7c1ab2@redhat.com/20260311-cve-v1-1-f72b4c7c1ab2@redhat.com/
timeline:
2025-10-15 - Vulnerability reported to vendor
2026-06-09 - Coordinated public release of advisory
2026-06-09 - Advisory Updated
